description: HSA kernel dispatch activity from hsa-snoop

panels.title: Kernel Launches Rate (by kernel, Prometheus rate())
SDMA I/O (DMA copy engines — N/A on APU/unified-memory nodes)
AIS — AMD Infinity Storage P2P Direct IO (requires --ais-snoop)
AIS Throughput (bytes/s by direction and PCIe device)
AIS IOPS (by direction and PCIe device)
AIS Latency Percentiles (p50 / p99 by direction)
AIS IO Size Distribution (p50 / p99 by direction and PCIe device)
AIS Error Rate (by direction, device, errno)

targets.expr: sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_rx_bytes_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_tx_bytes_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_rx_ops_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_tx_ops_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (increase(ais_rx_errors_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__range]) + increase(ais_tx_errors_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__range]))

title: HSA Snoop
